## User Stories / Issues

- Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` тАФ New feature
- [ ] `fix` тАФ Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` тАФ Refactor (neither feature nor fix)
- [ ] `style` тАФ UI / formatting
- [ ] `perf` тАФ Performance improvement
- [ ] `docs` тАФ Documentation
- [ ] `test` тАФ Tests
- [ ] `ci` / `build` тАФ CI, config, dependencies
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] The PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] `npm run dev` run without errors
- [ ] `npm run build` passes with no errors
- [ ] New API calls respect the architecture (`services/`, `adapters/`, `config/`)
- [ ] No API key / secret committed
- [ ] Documentation (`AGENTS.md`, READMEтАж) is updated if needed
